Case# SMPTETimeType.type2997

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+macOS 10.0+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
case type2997
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudiotypes/smptetimetype/type2997#Discussion)

29.97 video frames per second—standard for NTSC video.
